name: Sunburst Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease the sides and bottom of two 8-inch round baking pans. Line the bottoms with wax paper.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat the egg substitute on high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes.
4. Gradually add sugar, continuing to beat for 2 more minutes. Remove from the mixer.
5. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; add alternately with water and vanilla to the egg mixture, folding gently until combined.
6. Spread batter evenly in prepared pans.
7. Bake for 15-17 minutes or until the top springs back when touched lightly in the center.
8. Allow cooling for 5 minutes before removing from pans and peeling off the paper. Cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Prepare Citrus Filling: In a small mixing bowl, beat the dessert topping with milk until stiff peaks form (about 4 minutes). Reserve half of the orange segments for garnish; set aside.
10. Cut the remaining orange segments into thirds and gently fold them with the grated orange peel into the topping.
11. Assemble by placing one cake layer on a serving plate. Spoon half of the Citrus Filling onto the layer.
12. Top with the remaining cake layer and continue with the Citrus Filling. Garnish with reserved orange segments.
13. Cover and refrigerate for several hours.
